journeys.name: Load Paperclip company dashboard shell
steps: Navigate to /FAI/dashboard on the app base URL.
Wait deterministically for Dashboard, Agents, and FAI-5731 visible text.
Capture a full-page screenshot and extract visible document body text.

assertions.description: The Dashboard page is visible to a human reviewer.
The dashboard content includes company activity and agents.
assertions.observed: Playwright selectors for Agents and FAI-5731 resolved before screenshot.

assertions.description: The DOM text evidence is from a valid company route.
assertions.observed: Extracted body text length: 2773; text did not include Company not found.

evidence.description: Full-page screenshot after company dashboard shell load.
Extracted visible body text after company dashboard shell load.
